subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath revealed laws in accordance with His good-pleasure. Verily, He is sovereign over whatsoever He wisheth
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الحکم کیف شاء انه لهو الحاکم علی ما اراد یا احبائی ان اعملوا
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @law of fasting, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
